welcome.text: Hello 👋 Welcome to ChatsSync! Main kis cheez mein madad karun?

pricing.text:
💰 Hamare plans:
• Basic — PKR 1,000/month
• Pro — PKR 3,000/month
• Business — PKR 6,000/month

features.text:
✨ ChatsSync features:
• Omnichannel inbox
• Visual chatbot builder
• Team collaboration
• Reports & analytics

ask_feedback.text: Theek hai! Jaane se pehle — aapka experience kaisa raha?

thanks.text: Shukriya feedback ke liye 🙏 Achha din ho!

handover.text: Bilkul! Main aapko ek human agent se jod raha hoon. Thodi der mein koi aapse baat karega 🙌
